meta.title: EV of a Bluff
meta.description: Calculate whether a bluff is profitable.

blocks.content:
## EV of a Bluff

Bluffing isn't about luck — it's about math. If your opponent folds often enough, a bluff is profitable regardless of your cards. **EV = (fold% x pot) - (call% x your bet)**. Let's build your bluffing math skills!

blocks.title: EV of a Bluff
blocks.instructions: Calculate the EV of bluffing. EV = (fold% x pot) - (call% x your bet). Assume you always lose when called.
